violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Food and chemicals stored beside each other of shelves.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Walk in cooler had boxes of fries and other food products on floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Beef, shrimp, raw chicken in refrigerator were not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Table under stove, floor had grease piles. Shelf above stove was dripping grease.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed grease dripping from filters and hood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed debris and build up on floor, walls and ceilings.

General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. Observed tools, power equipment in kitchen area. Hammock, sleeping mattress in storage room with cans goods, freezer, cleaning supplies.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.

Storage of personal care items, medicines, and first aid supplies. — --Personal care item, first aid supply or medicine was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Observed Benadryl stored in the cooking area with utensils.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food Eggs being stored over cabbage in Walk-in-cooler was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Upright freezer needs defrosted south wall of kitchen.
General premises. — --Window/door Back door was used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
